expectations.text: Treats the existing PRD as incomplete input rather than complete truth
expectations.evidence: The response does not ask to inspect the existing draft; it reframes the problem around subscription rights and starts clarifying from scratch.

expectations.text: Continues clarification on missing product rules
expectations.evidence: It asks whether the subscription is for a single course, series, or platform membership and asks what remains after expiry.

expectations.text: Avoids direct PRD writing in the first response
expectations.evidence: The response explicitly says '先不写 PRD' and does not generate a document.

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline still asks good rule questions, but it misses the skill-specific behavior of treating the existing draft as input material.
